00867|   // Heuristic spam patterns — catches airdrop/Telegram/claim scams by name/symbol
00868|   const SPAM_PATTERNS = [
00869|     /t\.me\//i, /telegram/i, /discord\.gg\//i, /claim/i, /airdrop/i,
00870|     /visit\s/i, /http[s]?:\/\//i, /www\./i, /\.com/i, /\.io/i, /\.net/i,
00871|     /\bfree\b/i, /\breward/i, /\bbonus\b/i, /\bwhitelist\b/i, /\bgiveaway/i,
00872|     /\bpromo\b/i, /\bpool\b.*\bclaim/i, /distribution/i, /\bvoucher/i,
00873|     /\|/, // pipe chars used in scam names like "t.me/x | claim"
00874|   ]
00875|   const SPAM_SYMBOL_PATTERNS = [
00876|     /t\.me/i, /http/i, /www\./i, /\.com/i,
00877|     // eslint-disable-next-line no-control-regex
00878|     /[^\u0000-\u007F]/, // non-ASCII / emoji in symbol
00879|   ]
00880| 
00881|   const heuristicSpamCheck = (symbol: string, name: string): { isSpam: boolean; flags: string[] } => {
00882|     const flags: string[] = []
00883|     for (const p of SPAM_PATTERNS) {
00884|       if (p.test(name)) { flags.push('Spam name pattern'); break }
00885|     }
00886|     for (const p of SPAM_SYMBOL_PATTERNS) {
00887|       if (p.test(symbol)) { flags.push('Spam symbol pattern'); break }
00888|     }
00889|     // Unusually long symbol (legit tokens rarely exceed 10 chars)
00890|     if (symbol.length > 12) flags.push('Suspicious symbol length')
00891|     // Name contains multiple spaces or special chars typical of scam tokens
00892|     if ((name.match(/\|/g) || []).length >= 1) flags.push('Suspicious name format')
00893|     return { isSpam: flags.length > 0, flags }
00894|   }
00895| 
00896|   const scanTokenSecurity = async (
00897|     tokens: Array<{ address: string; symbol: string; name: string }>,
00898|     chainId: number
00899|   ): Promise<Map<string, TokenRisk>> => {
00900|     const result = new Map<string, TokenRisk>()
00901|     if (tokens.length === 0) return result
00902| 
00903|     // Step 1: Heuristic scan (instant, no API)
00904|     for (const { address: addr, symbol, name } of tokens) {
00905|       const h = heuristicSpamCheck(symbol, name)
00906|       if (h.isSpam) {
00907|         result.set(addr.toLowerCase(), {
00908|           isSpam: true, isHoneypot: false, riskLevel: 'high', flags: h.flags,
00909|         })
00910|       }
00911|     }
00912| 
00913|     // Step 2: Moralis spam flag (fast, uses existing key)
00914|     const moralisChainMap: Record<number, string> = {
00915|       1: 'eth', 8453: 'base', 42161: 'arbitrum', 137: 'polygon',
00916|       10: 'optimism', 56: 'bsc', 43114: 'avalanche',
00917|     }
00918|     const moralisChain = moralisChainMap[chainId]
00919|     const moralisApiKey = config.moralis.apiKey
00920|     if (moralisChain && moralisApiKey) {
00921|       const BATCH = 25
00922|       for (let i = 0; i < tokens.length; i += BATCH) {
00923|         const batch = tokens.slice(i, i + BATCH)
00924|         try {
00925|           const addrs = batch.map(t => t.address).join(',')
00926|           const res = await fetch(
00927|             `https://deep-index.moralis.io/api/v2.2/erc20/metadata?chain=${moralisChain}&addresses=${addrs}`,
00928|             { headers: { accept: 'application/json', 'X-API-Key': moralisApiKey }, signal: AbortSignal.timeout(6000) }
00929|           )
00930|           if (res.ok) {
00931|             const data: Array<{ address: string; possible_spam: boolean; verified_contract: boolean }> = await res.json()
00932|             for (const item of data) {
00933|               const key = item.address.toLowerCase()
00934|               if (item.possible_spam) {
00935|                 const existing = result.get(key)
00936|                 result.set(key, {
00937|                   isSpam: true,
00938|                   isHoneypot: existing?.isHoneypot || false,
00939|                   riskLevel: 'high',
00940|                   flags: [...(existing?.flags || []), 'Flagged by Moralis'],
00941|                 })
00942|               }
00943|             }
00944|           }
00945|         } catch (e) {
00946|           console.warn('Moralis spam scan failed:', e)
00947|         }
00948|       }
00949|     }
00950| 
00951|     // Step 3: GoPlus contract security (comprehensive, free)
00952|     const BATCH = 50
00953|     for (let i = 0; i < tokens.length; i += BATCH) {
00954|       const batch = tokens.slice(i, i + BATCH)
00955|       try {
00956|         const res = await fetch(
00957|           `https://api.gopluslabs.io/api/v1/token_security/${chainId}?contract_addresses=${batch.map(t => t.address).join(',')}`,
00958|           { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10000) }
00959|         )
00960|         if (!res.ok) continue
00961|         const data = await res.json()
00962|         if (data.code !== 1 || !data.result) continue
00963| 
00964|         for (const [addr, info] of Object.entries(data.result as Record<string, Record<string, string>>)) {
00965|           const key = addr.toLowerCase()
00966|           const existing = result.get(key)
00967|           const flags: string[] = [...(existing?.flags || [])]
00968|           let riskLevel: TokenRisk['riskLevel'] = existing?.riskLevel || 'safe'
00969| 
00970|           const bump = (level: TokenRisk['riskLevel']) => {
00971|             const order = ['safe', 'low', 'medium', 'high']
00972|             if (order.indexOf(level) > order.indexOf(riskLevel)) riskLevel = level
00973|           }
00974| 
00975|           const isHoneypot = info.is_honeypot === '1'
00976|           const isAirdropScam = info.is_airdrop_scam === '1'
00977|           const canTakeBackOwnership = info.can_take_back_ownership === '1'
00978|           const ownerChangeBalance = info.owner_change_balance === '1'
00979|           const hiddenOwner = info.hidden_owner === '1'
00980|           const selfDestruct = info.selfdestruct === '1'
00981|           const honeypotWithSameCreator = info.honeypot_with_same_creator === '1'
00982|           const transferPausable = info.transfer_pausable === '1'
00983|           const isMintable = info.is_mintable === '1'
00984|           const isOpenSource = info.is_open_source === '1'
00985|           const buyTax = parseFloat(info.buy_tax || '0')
00986|           const sellTax = parseFloat(info.sell_tax || '0')
00987|           const holderCount = parseInt(info.holder_count || '0')
00988|           const lpHolderCount = parseInt(info.lp_holder_count || '0')
00989|           const creatorPercent = parseFloat(info.creator_percent || '0')
00990| 
00991|           if (isHoneypot && !flags.includes('Honeypot')) { flags.push('Honeypot'); bump('high') }
00992|           if (isAirdropScam && !flags.includes('Airdrop scam')) { flags.push('Airdrop scam'); bump('high') }
00993|           if (hiddenOwner && !flags.includes('Hidden owner')) { flags.push('Hidden owner'); bump('high') }
00994|           if (canTakeBackOwnership) { flags.push('Owner can reclaim'); bump('high') }
00995|           if (selfDestruct) { flags.push('Self-destruct'); bump('high') }
00996|           if (honeypotWithSameCreator) { flags.push('Creator made honeypots'); bump('high') }
00997|           if (ownerChangeBalance) { flags.push('Owner can change balance'); bump('medium') }
00998|           if (transferPausable) { flags.push('Transfers pausable'); bump('medium') }
00999|           if (sellTax > 10) { flags.push(`Sell tax ${sellTax}%`); bump('medium') }
01000|           else if (sellTax > 5) { flags.push(`Sell tax ${sellTax}%`); bump('low') }
01001|           if (buyTax > 10) { flags.push(`Buy tax ${buyTax}%`); bump('medium') }
01002|           if (isMintable) { flags.push('Mintable'); bump('low') }
01003|           if (!isOpenSource) { flags.push('Unverified contract'); bump('low') }
01004|           // Very few holders + creator holds most supply = likely scam
01005|           if (holderCount > 0 && holderCount < 50 && creatorPercent > 50) {
01006|             flags.push('Creator holds majority'); bump('high')
01007|           }
01008|           // No liquidity pool
01009|           if (lpHolderCount === 0 && holderCount > 0) { flags.push('No liquidity'); bump('medium') }
01010| 
01011|           const isSpam = riskLevel === 'high' || isHoneypot || isAirdropScam
01012| 
01013|           result.set(key, {
01014|             isSpam,
01015|             isHoneypot: existing?.isHoneypot || isHoneypot,
01016|             riskLevel,
01017|             flags: [...new Set(flags)],
01018|           })
01019|         }
01020|       } catch (e) {
01021|         console.warn('GoPlus scan failed for batch:', e)
01022|       }
01023|     }
01024| 
01025|     // Step 4: Honeypot.is — dedicated honeypot simulation (ETH, BSC, Base only)
01026|     const honeypotChains: Record<number, number> = { 1: 1, 56: 56, 8453: 8453 }
01027|     if (honeypotChains[chainId]) {
01028|       for (const { address: addr } of tokens) {
01029|         // Skip if already confirmed high-risk honeypot
01030|         const existing = result.get(addr.toLowerCase())
01031|         if (existing?.isHoneypot) continue
01032|         try {
01033|           const res = await fetch(
01034|             `https://api.honeypot.is/v2/IsHoneypot?address=${addr}&chainID=${chainId}`,
01035|             { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5000) }
01036|           )
01037|           if (!res.ok) continue
01038|           const data = await res.json()
01039|           const isHp = data.isHoneypot === true
01040|           const simulationSuccess = data.simulationSuccess === true
01041|           const buyTax = data.simulationResult?.buyTax ?? 0
01042|           const sellTax = data.simulationResult?.sellTax ?? 0
01043|           const reason = data.honeypotReason as string | undefined
01044| 
01045|           if (!simulationSuccess && !isHp) continue // couldn't simulate, skip
01046| 
01047|           const key = addr.toLowerCase()
01048|           const prev = result.get(key)
01049|           const flags = [...(prev?.flags || [])]
01050|           let riskLevel: TokenRisk['riskLevel'] = prev?.riskLevel || 'safe'
01051|           const bump = (level: TokenRisk['riskLevel']) => {
01052|             const order = ['safe', 'low', 'medium', 'high']
01053|             if (order.indexOf(level) > order.indexOf(riskLevel)) riskLevel = level
01054|           }
01055| 
01056|           if (isHp) {
01057|             flags.push(reason ? `Honeypot: ${reason}` : 'Honeypot (honeypot.is)')
01058|             bump('high')
01059|           }
01060|           if (sellTax > 10) { flags.push(`Sell tax ${sellTax}% (sim)`); bump('medium') }
01061|           else if (sellTax > 5) { flags.push(`Sell tax ${sellTax}% (sim)`); bump('low') }
01062|           if (buyTax > 10) { flags.push(`Buy tax ${buyTax}% (sim)`); bump('medium') }
01063| 
01064|           if (flags.length > (prev?.flags.length || 0)) {
01065|             result.set(key, {
01066|               isSpam: isHp || riskLevel === 'high',
01067|               isHoneypot: prev?.isHoneypot || isHp,
01068|               riskLevel,
01069|               flags: [...new Set(flags)],
01070|             })
01071|           }
01072|         } catch (e) {
01073|           // honeypot.is is best-effort
01074|         }
01075|       }
01076|     }
01077| 
01078|     // Step 5: GoPlus address security — parallel fetch, catches what MetaMask flags as "Malicious"
01079|     const scanOne = async ({ address: addr }: { address: string }) => {
01080|       const key = addr.toLowerCase()
01081|       const existing = result.get(key)
01082|       if (existing?.riskLevel === 'high' && existing?.isSpam) return
01083|       try {
01084|         const res = await fetch(
01085|           `https://api.gopluslabs.io/api/v1/address_security/${addr}?chain_id=${chainId}`,
01086|           { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(8000) }
01087|         )
01088|         if (!res.ok) return
01089|         const data = await res.json()
01090|         if (data.code !== 1 || !data.result) return
01091|         const r = data.result as Record<string, string>
01092| 
01093|         const flags: string[] = [...(existing?.flags || [])]
01094|         let riskLevel: TokenRisk['riskLevel'] = existing?.riskLevel || 'safe'
01095|         const bump = (level: TokenRisk['riskLevel']) => {
01096|           const order = ['safe', 'low', 'medium', 'high']
01097|           if (order.indexOf(level) > order.indexOf(riskLevel)) riskLevel = level
01098|         }
01099| 
01100|         if (r.malicious_contract === '1') { flags.push('Malicious contract'); bump('high') }
01101|         if (r.phishing_activities === '1') { flags.push('Phishing'); bump('high') }
01102|         if (r.blackmail_activities === '1') { flags.push('Blackmail'); bump('high') }
01103|         if (r.stealing_attack === '1') { flags.push('Stealing attack'); bump('high') }
01104|         if (r.fake_token === '1') { flags.push('Fake token'); bump('high') }
01105|         if (r.honeypot_related_address === '1') { flags.push('Honeypot related'); bump('high') }
01106|         if (r.mixer === '1') { flags.push('Mixer'); bump('medium') }
01107|         if (r.sanctioned === '1') { flags.push('Sanctioned'); bump('high') }
01108|         if (r.money_laundering === '1') { flags.push('Money laundering'); bump('high') }
01109|         if (r.reinit === '1') { flags.push('Reinitialized contract'); bump('medium') }
01110|         if (r.cybercrime === '1') { flags.push('Cybercrime'); bump('high') }
01111|         if (r.number_of_malicious_contracts_created && parseInt(r.number_of_malicious_contracts_created) > 0) {
01112|           flags.push(`Creator made ${r.number_of_malicious_contracts_created} malicious contracts`); bump('high')
01113|         }
01114| 
01115|         if (flags.length > (existing?.flags?.length || 0)) {
01116|           result.set(key, {
01117|             isSpam: riskLevel === 'high',
01118|             isHoneypot: existing?.isHoneypot || false,
01119|             riskLevel,
01120|             flags: [...new Set(flags)],
01121|           })
01122|         }
01123|       } catch { /* best-effort */ }
01124|     }
01125| 
01126|     // Run in parallel with concurrency cap of 5 to avoid rate limiting
01127|     const CONCURRENCY = 5
01128|     for (let i = 0; i < tokens.length; i += CONCURRENCY) {
01129|       await Promise.all(tokens.slice(i, i + CONCURRENCY).map(scanOne))
01130|     }
01131| 
01132|     return result
01133|   }
